Generated Narrative: CodeSystem v2-0520

Properties

Concepts

This case-sensitive code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0520 defines the following codes in a Is-A hierarchy:

CodeDisplayDefinitionStatus

name: MessageWaitingPriority
title: messageWaitingPriority
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts which specify the disposition of the patient at time of discharge (i.e., discharged to home, expired, etc.).  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the MSA segment.
purpose: Underlying Master Code System for V2 table 0520 (Message Waiting Priority)
